records.m_Talk_ENG: No one... can stop us...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Sigma Pirates...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Cheer up. At least we know it's not on the island.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Cheer up. At least we know it's not on the island.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Cheer up. At least we know it's not on the island.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Or is it because of Mone? We can't force her to join, especially since she's trying to help out her parents.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Or is it because of Mone? We can't force her to join, especially since she's trying to help out her parents.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry. I don't think I can join your journey because I have to help my parents.

records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry. I don't think I can join your journey because I have to help my parents.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But if you ever need Mone, let me know! I'll do my best to help, ma'am!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But if you ever need Mone, let me know! I'll do my best to help, ma'am!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But if you ever need Mone, let me know! I'll do my best to help, ma'am!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Moena gave us a ticket to get us back to Ground One, so let's focus on that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Moena gave us a ticket to get us back to Ground One, so let's focus on that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Moena gave us a ticket to get us back to Ground One, so let's focus on that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh. My dream of completing a whole pirate crew...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh. My dream of completing a whole pirate crew...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh. My dream of completing a whole pirate crew...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The treasure isn't even your main goal, is it, Chief?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The treasure isn't even your main goal, is it, Chief?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The treasure isn't even your main goal, is it, Chief?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yuppie-yuppie. Credere found the treasure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yuppie-yuppie. Credere found the treasure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yuppie-yuppie. Credere found the treasure.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The treasure was an information transfer module created with state-of-the-art technology.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The treasure was an information transfer module created with state-of-the-art technology.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The treasure was an information transfer module created with state-of-the-art technology.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you talking about? This is an ordinary memory card.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you talking about? This is an ordinary memory card.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you talking about? This is an ordinary memory card.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is treasure. The owner said this could make us rich.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is treasure. The owner said this could make us rich.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is treasure. The owner said this could make us rich.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please. Don't tell me you stole this from its owner.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please. Don't tell me you stole this from its owner.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please. Don't tell me you stole this from its owner.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Should Credere have taken him hostage, since he might have had company?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Should Credere have taken him hostage, since he might have had company?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Should Credere have taken him hostage, since he might have had company?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Credere can't, Yuppie. That's illegal.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Credere can't, Yuppie. That's illegal.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Credere can't, Yuppie. That's illegal.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll take this, so quit talking nonsense and go find the owner.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll take this, so quit talking nonsense and go find the owner.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll take this, so quit talking nonsense and go find the owner.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The treasure isn't here. So don't you dare stray away, okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The treasure isn't here. So don't you dare stray away, okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The treasure isn't here. So don't you dare stray away, okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yuuup.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yuuup.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yuuup.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you hear that, Sigma? We'll be inspecting every corner of this ship's structure together.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you hear that, Sigma? We'll be inspecting every corner of this ship's structure together.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you hear that, Sigma? We'll be inspecting every corner of this ship's structure together.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ooh, an adventure. Fun!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ooh, an adventure. Fun!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ooh, an adventure. Fun!

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* I've got two kids now. This should be included in my performance evaluation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* I've got two kids now. This should be included in my performance evaluation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* I've got two kids now. This should be included in my performance evaluation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Someone has to recognize all this effort.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Someone has to recognize all this effort.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Someone has to recognize all this effort.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Life, however, is and always will be lonesome, girl.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Life, however, is and always will be lonesome, girl.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Life, however, is and always will be lonesome, girl.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kapow.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kapow.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kapow.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Jun! You can't just suddenly run out!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Jun! You can't just suddenly run out!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Jun! You can't just suddenly run out!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are late, little sister. I was chasing the shadow of evil.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are late, little sister. I was chasing the shadow of evil.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are late, little sister. I was chasing the shadow of evil.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What "shadow"? You don't even know who the culprit is.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What "shadow"? You don't even know who the culprit is.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What "shadow"? You don't even know who the culprit is.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And about the little sister!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And about the little sister!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And about the little sister!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You didn't forget our promise now, did you, Jun? We decided that we'd fight and the loser would become the younger sibling!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You didn't forget our promise now, did you, Jun? We decided that we'd fight and the loser would become the younger sibling!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You didn't forget our promise now, did you, Jun? We decided that we'd fight and the loser would become the younger sibling!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The score is tied at 2:2!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The score is tied at 2:2!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The score is tied at 2:2!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Heh. Call me boss if you don't want to call me big brother.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Heh. Call me boss if you don't want to call me big brother.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Heh. Call me boss if you don't want to call me big brother.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm the one who joined Innovation first. Kapow.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm the one who joined Innovation first. Kapow.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm the one who joined Innovation first. Kapow.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No to either of those options! You can't bring up work! That's unfair!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No to either of those options! You can't bring up work! That's unfair!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No to either of those options! You can't bring up work! That's unfair!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The chief was the same, but is it some kind of trend to pop out of nowhere?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The chief was the same, but is it some kind of trend to pop out of nowhere?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The chief was the same, but is it some kind of trend to pop out of nowhere?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Excuse me. Let me introduce myself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Excuse me. Let me introduce myself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Excuse me. Let me introduce myself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm the Judicator of Evil, Gabriel Jun the Vicious Breaker.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm the Judicator of Evil, Gabriel Jun the Vicious Breaker.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm the Judicator of Evil, Gabriel Jun the Vicious Breaker.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kachow! And I'm the Chaser of Evil, Raphaela Juri the Evil Chaser!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kachow! And I'm the Chaser of Evil, Raphaela Juri the Evil Chaser!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kachow! And I'm the Chaser of Evil, Raphaela Juri the Evil Chaser!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's way too long. I'm just calling you the Chow-pow siblings.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's way too long. I'm just calling you the Chow-pow siblings.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's way too long. I'm just calling you the Chow-pow siblings.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You can't just shorten our names like that! And what's "Chow-pow," anyway?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You can't just shorten our names like that! And what's "Chow-pow," anyway?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You can't just shorten our names like that! And what's "Chow-pow," anyway?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'd prefer it to be Pow-chow, girl.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'd prefer it to be Pow-chow, girl.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'd prefer it to be Pow-chow, girl.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seriously?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Seriously?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Seriously?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway. Have you seen anyone suspicious looking around, girl?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway. Have you seen anyone suspicious looking around, girl?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway. Have you seen anyone suspicious looking around, girl?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have. Two people who stand on one leg and shout "kachow" and "kapow."
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have. Two people who stand on one leg and shout "kachow" and "kapow."
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have. Two people who stand on one leg and shout "kachow" and "kapow."

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're not joking around! Jun and I are on the hunt for the leak at Alphatrix!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're not joking around! Jun and I are on the hunt for the leak at Alphatrix!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're not joking around! Jun and I are on the hunt for the leak at Alphatrix!

records.m_Talk_ENG: According to the investigation, the culprit boarded this ship to meet a broker.
records.m_Talk_DEU: According to the investigation, the culprit boarded this ship to meet a broker.
records.m_Talk_FRA: According to the investigation, the culprit boarded this ship to meet a broker.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We have to catch them before it's too late.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We have to catch them before it's too late.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We have to catch them before it's too late.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That still doesn't ring a bell. I've been here the whole time after boarding the ship.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That still doesn't ring a bell. I've been here the whole time after boarding the ship.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That still doesn't ring a bell. I've been here the whole time after boarding the ship.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm. Is that so?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm. Is that so?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm. Is that so?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then excuse me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then excuse me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then excuse me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you frisking me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you frisking me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you frisking me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. Hope you understand, the situation is dire.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. Hope you understand, the situation is dire.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. Hope you understand, the situation is dire.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stay still. It's just a formality, so it'll end soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stay still. It's just a formality, so it'll end soon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stay still. It's just a formality, so it'll end soon.
